_meta.note: Production compliance dataset. Category-level accuracy; EVERY rule is flagged needs_legal_review=true and must be verified against the current official text before any legal assertion is shown to a seller.

gst.note: GST registration is generally required only when annual aggregate turnover crosses the threshold (₹40 lakh for goods; ₹20 lakh in special-category states). Most SHG / home-based sellers are below it. Note the 2023 relief (Notification 34/2023-Central Tax) exempting certain small suppliers selling through e-commerce operators from compulsory registration, subject to conditions.

handloom_textiles.label: Handloom & Textiles
handloom_textiles.label_template: Fabric: <fabric_content>. Care: <care_instructions>. Net Qty: <net_quantity>. MRP: ₹<mrp> (incl. all taxes). Mfg: <mm/yyyy>. Marketed/Packed by: <packer_name>, <address>. Country of Origin: India. Customer care: <phone_or_email>.
handloom_textiles.notes: Pre-packaged goods attract Legal Metrology mandatory declarations. No special licence for basic sale of handloom.

apparel_readymade.label: Readymade Apparel
apparel_readymade.label_template: Size: <size>. Fabric: <fabric_content>. Care: <care_instructions>. MRP: ₹<mrp> (incl. all taxes). Mfg: <mm/yyyy>. Marketed by: <packer_name>, <address>. Country of Origin: India.
apparel_readymade.notes: Add clear size and fibre composition to reduce returns and meet labelling norms.

food_packaged.label: Food & Beverages
food_packaged.label_template: <product_name>. Ingredients: <ingredients>. Veg/Non-Veg: <green/brown dot>. Net Wt: <net_weight>. Batch: <lot>. Mfg: <dd/mm/yyyy>. Best Before: <duration/date>. Allergens: <allergens>. FSSAI Lic. No.: <fssai_number>. Mfd & marketed by: <fbo_name>, <address>.
food_packaged.notes: FSSAI registration is mandatory for any food business. Tier by turnover: Basic registration (< ₹12 lakh), State licence (₹12 lakh–₹20 crore), Central licence (> ₹20 crore). Perishable — prefer regional fulfilment.

jewellery_precious.label: Precious Jewellery (Gold/Silver)
regime: Hallmarking of Gold Jewellery & Artefacts Regulations
jewellery_precious.label_template: Purity: <carat>K (<fineness>). BIS Hallmark + HUID: <huid>. Net Wt: <net_weight> g. Jeweller Reg. No.: <bis_reg>. Sold by: <name>, <address>.
jewellery_precious.notes: Hallmarking with a 6-digit HUID is mandatory for gold jewellery/artefacts in notified districts. The jeweller must be BIS-registered. High value — insured shipping.

imitation_jewellery.label: Imitation / Fashion Jewellery
imitation_jewellery.label_template: Material: <material>. Net Qty: <net_quantity>. MRP: ₹<mrp> (incl. all taxes). Marketed by: <packer_name>, <address>. Country of Origin: India.
imitation_jewellery.notes: No hallmark required. Standard pre-packaged labelling applies. Declare 'nickel-free' only if true.

cosmetics_handmade.label: Cosmetics & Personal Care
cosmetics_handmade.label_template: <product_name>. Ingredients: <ingredients>. Net Qty: <net_weight>. Mfg: <mm/yyyy>. Best Before: <duration>. Batch: <batch>. Mfg Lic. No.: <license>. Manufactured by: <name>, <address>.
cosmetics_handmade.notes: Cosmetics are regulated by CDSCO under the Cosmetics Rules, 2020. Small-scale makers generally need a manufacturing licence from the State Licensing Authority. Verify tier and forms.

handicrafts_decor.label: Handicrafts & Home Décor
handicrafts_decor.label_template: Material: <material>. Net Qty: <net_quantity>. MRP: ₹<mrp> (incl. all taxes). Made & packed by: <packer_name>, <address>. Country of Origin: India.
handicrafts_decor.notes: Generally no special licence. Often fragile — protective packing. GI tag if the craft is registered (e.g. Channapatna toys, Blue Pottery).

home_furnishing.label: Home Furnishing
home_furnishing.label_template: Size: <dimensions>. Fabric: <fabric_content>. Care: <care_instructions>. Net Qty: <net_quantity>. MRP: ₹<mrp> (incl. all taxes). Marketed by: <packer_name>, <address>. Country of Origin: India.
home_furnishing.notes: Declare exact dimensions — the top return driver in furnishing.

toys_games.label: Toys & Games
toys_games.label_template: ISI/BIS: <bis_licence>. Suitable for: <age_group>. Warning: <safety_warning>. Net Qty: <net_quantity>. Made by: <name>, <address>. Country of Origin: India.
toys_games.notes: Toys need mandatory BIS certification under the Toys QCO. Certain handmade/GI-registered toys may have exemptions — verify carefully.

bags_leather.label: Bags & Leather Accessories
bags_leather.label_template: Material: <material>. Size: <dimensions>. Net Qty: <net_quantity>. MRP: ₹<mrp> (incl. all taxes). Marketed by: <packer_name>, <address>. Country of Origin: India.
bags_leather.notes: Declare genuine vs faux leather honestly to avoid returns and misbranding.

ayurvedic_herbal.label: Ayurvedic / Herbal Products
ayurvedic_herbal.label_template: <product_name> (Ayurvedic Proprietary). Ingredients: <ingredients>. Net Wt: <net_weight>. Mfg: <mm/yyyy>. Best Before: <duration>. Batch: <batch>. AYUSH Lic. No.: <license>. Mfd by: <name>, <address>. Directions: <use>.
ayurvedic_herbal.notes: Ayurvedic/herbal products marketed with therapeutic claims require an AYUSH manufacturing licence. Avoid unproven medical claims.

candles_fragrance.label: Candles & Home Fragrance
candles_fragrance.label_template: <product_name>. Material: <wax_type>. Net Wt: <net_weight>. Burn time: <hours>. Warning: never leave a burning candle unattended. MRP: ₹<mrp> (incl. all taxes). Made by: <packer_name>, <address>. Country of Origin: India.
candles_fragrance.notes: Include a fire-safety warning. No special licence for basic sale.

stationery_paper.label: Stationery & Paper Crafts
stationery_paper.label_template: <product_name>. Material: <material>. Size: <dimensions>. Net Qty: <net_quantity>. MRP: ₹<mrp> (incl. all taxes). Made by: <packer_name>, <address>. Country of Origin: India.
